translations.en: a burly man, who looks a little healthier than the other patients.
translations.zh: 身形魁梧之男子，看上去比其他傷患稍好一些。

translations.en: "I am called Gertan. My fellows and I are recovering from a fierce @battle."
translations.zh: 「吾名葛爾坦。吾等正在從一場激烈的@battle（戰鬥）中恢復。」

translations.en: "I lead my men into @battle whenever @Geoffrey sends me."
translations.zh: 「每當@battle（傑佛）瑞派遣，吾便率部衝入@Geoffrey（戰陣）。」

translations.en: "He is the captain of the guard."
"We sought to liberate the Shrine of Compassion."
translations.zh: 「吾等欲從敵手奪回慈悲聖壇。」

translations.en: "My men fought valiantly, but the gargoyles were too much for us. They didst @slay more than half our party."
translations.zh: 「吾麾下英勇奮戰，奈何魔像族勢不可擋。他們@slay（殺死）了我方過半人馬。」

translations.en: "Aye, I doubt not they were using foul @magic of some kind."
translations.zh: 「是的，吾確信他們施用了某種邪惡的@magic（魔法）。」

translations.en: "A moonstone was upon the shrine, surrounded by a strange violet glow."
translations.zh: 「聖壇之上有一塊月光石，四周籠罩著奇異的紫色光芒。」

translations.en: "I tried to get to it, but 'twas surrounded by some kind of force @field."
translations.zh: 「吾試圖靠近，卻被某種@field（能量）場所阻隔。」

translations.en: "Hast thou heard, then, of the time I slew the great @dragon Freitag? Ah, that was a long time ago."
translations.zh: 「汝可曾聽聞，吾昔日斬殺大@dragon（巨龍）瑞塔之事？唉，那已是許久之前了。」

translations.en: "May thy efforts meet with more success than mine!"
translations.zh: 「願汝有所建樹，勝過吾之落敗！」

translator_notes: Gertan 使用 thee/thou 古英文，譯為文白並用。弗瑞塔（Freitag）已在 glossary。
